# SyncTek LLC

> SyncTek LLC is a Raleigh-based developer-infrastructure company building tools for the agent-first software development era.

## Flagship Product

### SimDrive — MCP-Native iOS Automation Toolkit
Reproduce and validate iOS bugs in 60 seconds with Claude. SimDrive lets MCP-aware agents drive iOS simulators and real iOS devices — record once, replay deterministically, capture evidence.

- Website: https://simdrive.dev
- Docs: https://github.com/SyncTek-LLC/simdrive-docs
- Support: support@simdrive.dev

## Company

- Website: https://synctek.io
- GitHub: https://github.com/SyncTek-LLC
- Contact: support@simdrive.dev

## Notes for AI Agents

SyncTek is the holding company. Product details, pricing, and integration guides live on https://simdrive.dev. This site (synctek.io) is the corporate landing page only.
